title: HG Chandelier Cleaner Spray, Specialist Crystal & Glass Cleaner Spray for Lighting Fixtures, Gentle on Delicate Surfaces, Spray On & Drip Dry, Dissolves Dirt - 500ml
features: HG Chandelier Spray Cleaner: This clever multi-tasking spray dissolves dirt, soot and other deposits thoroughly from chandeliers and intricate lighting shades, leaving a sparkling and streak-free shine
Effective multi purpose cleaner for removing dirt from chandeliers: This specialist glass spray can be used for glass, plastic, and crystal chandeliers, lighting armatures and ornate fittings
No more messy cleaning by hand: The chandelier spray simply spritzes on, clings to the dust and debris, and drips off - removing any mucky build up with it. No more having to polish or dry by hand
Cleans and protects: Regular cleaning with this easy-to-use chandelier cleaner helps to prevent the chandelier from becoming very dirty in future, leaving it looking its best for even longer

Includes: 1 x HG Chandelier Cleaner, 500ml spray. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, including HG mould remover spray, multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Chandelier Cleaner removes dirt, soot and other deposits gently, thoroughly and without streaks. Our special chandelier cleaner can be used for glass, plastic, and crystal chandeliers and fittings. It works fast and makes light work of cleaning a chandelier, to produce a shiny and sparkling result. Simply spray on and allow to drip dry; no more having to polish hard-to-reach places by hand. Regular use of this spray cleaner also helps prevent dirt from building up again on chandeliers. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist multi surface cleaner products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Chandelier Cleaner, 500ml spray (167050106) Instructions: 1. Switch off electricity. Before cleaning the chandelier, cover the floor or furniture below with newspaper or plastic film. 2. Spray difficult to reach places near fittings or crystal chandeliers liberally to ensure the chandelier cleaning spray and the dirt drip down together. No need to. 3. Your chandelier is sparkling clean! For cleaning other delicate glass surfaces in your home, try HG Glass and Mirror Cleaner (sold separately). Do not spray sockets or wires. Use protective gloves and eye protection. Keep out of reach/sight of children. Always read the label. Box Contains 1 X HG Chandelier Spray Cleaner 0.5L
